project_type: Next.js 16 frontend (part of monorepo with Express API)
build_command: npm run build (runs next build) from apps/web
test_command: No tests configured; build success is the verification
verification_instructions: Run `npx next build` in apps/web. With output: 'export', it should produce an `out/` directory with static HTML files and no serverless functions.
snapshot_or_generated_files: out/ directory is generated by build but gitignored
environment_constraints: Need npm install to build. No test suite exists.
contribution_requirements: None documented beyond AGENTS.md which warns about Next.js 16 differences
key_patterns: Pages use 'use client' directive. Only page.tsx (homepage) is a server component with async data fetching. All API calls go to NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL (Render backend). vercel.json has rewrites from /api/* to the Render API.
directory_structure: apps/web/ is the Next.js app. apps/api/ is the Express backend. Root has docs/guides.
